% JASA quadrant counts across all 114 sets (10 recordings, 4 exercises).
% Generated by analysis of inspections/jasa_all_recordings.png.
% Requires the booktabs package: \usepackage{booktabs}

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
% Table 1 — per exercise
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
\begin{table}[ht]
  \centering
  \caption{JASA-kvadrantfordeling per øvelse (n = 114 sett).
    Hvert sett klassifiseres ut fra fortegnet til EMG MNF-slope (x) og RMS-slope (y):
    FATIGUE = MNF$\downarrow$ \& RMS$\uparrow$;
    RECOVERY = MNF$\uparrow$ \& RMS$\downarrow$;
    force$\uparrow$ = begge stiger;
    force$\downarrow$ = begge faller (Luttmann et al.\ 1996).}
  \label{tab:jasa_per_exercise}
  \begin{tabular}{lrrrrr}
    \toprule
    Øvelse      & FATIGUE & RECOVERY & force$\uparrow$ & force$\downarrow$ & Totalt \\
    \midrule
    Squat       &  5 & 12 & 8 & 5 & 30 \\
    Deadlift    & 10 & 14 & 3 & 3 & 30 \\
    Benchpress  &  7 & 13 & 5 & 5 & 30 \\
    Pullup      & 10 &  8 & 4 & 2 & 24 \\
    \midrule
    \textbf{Totalt} & \textbf{32} & \textbf{47} & \textbf{20} & \textbf{15} & \textbf{114} \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
\end{table}
